## Decisions
- Badge system: status-driven ("Live" for live, "Building" for draft) instead of featured/live
- Badge colors: OKLCH via scoped CSS, not Tailwind utility classes (reliable in both modes)
- Video compression: 1280px wide, VP9 CRF 35 (webm) + H264 CRF 28 (mp4), audio stripped
- Video UX: autoplay+loop, click-to-pause with overlay, IntersectionObserver scroll-pause
- Project card layout: title+badge+Live/Source on one row, hook below, Analysis/Writeup+tags together, stats, video
- Content helpers in src/data/content.ts: getLiveProjects, getVisiblePosts, formatDate, formatDateMonthYear
- Icons consolidated in src/data/icons.ts: brandIcons (filled) + lucideIcons (stroke)
- Dependencies: 14 remaining (no radix-ui, no lucide-react)
- Previous decisions still apply: warm-tinted design, config-driven, no h1 on homepage/about, demo-first

## Open Items
- Phase 5: Sidequests demo video still needed (3rd featured project)
- Phase 6: Deploy & cutover to eeshans.com (deferred until videos done)
- Placeholder MDX posts not integrated into writing page
- Bidirectional project↔writing links (posts have relatedProject but not linked from projects page)
- Writing page: no featured treatment for standout posts
- Projects page: no hero/larger card treatment for featured projects
- SEO OG images not yet added
- If a new Substack post is published, run `pnpm refresh:substack` then add enrichment to `src/data/post-enrichment.ts` (series, tags, relatedProject)
- `src/lib/substack.ts` is now only used by the content collection loader, not by pages directly

## Resume Plan
1. Record Sidequests demo video → add to project frontmatter → Phase 5 complete
2. Polish remaining UX items (featured posts, project card size tiers)
3. Phase 6: deploy & cutover to eeshans.com

## Notes
- User controls the dev server — do not start one unless asked
- Do not push commits without asking
- `.env` contains GITHUB_TOKEN + PostHog keys — never print or commit
- Substack refresh: `pnpm refresh:substack` — updates `.cache/substack-feed.json`
- Post enrichment: `src/data/post-enrichment.ts` — add series/tags/relatedProject per slug
- Posts are Substack-sourced: custom content collection loader reads cache + enrichment, no more MDX stubs
- Content editing guide at CONTENT.md
- Architecture doc at internal_docs/portfolio-architecture.md
- Brand vision doc at internal_docs/portfolio-rebuild-analysis.md
- Demo video workflow: drop .mp4 in `public/videos/`, compress with ffmpeg, update project MDX frontmatter
